meta.title: Someone Did A Snapshot In Time #shorts
meta.description: Spending big on a snapshot doesn’t mean you’ve bought real, continuous security.

errors: Download failed - yt-dlp error: ERROR: [youtube] YsSulU4rhS4: Unable to download API page: ('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required')) (caused by ProxyError("('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required'))")); please report this issue on  https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/issues?q= , filling out the appropriate issue template.
